endpoint_uid: String: Required: Unique identifier of the endpoint in the source system.
hostname: String: Required: Primary hostname of the endpoint.
security_update: String: Recommended: Identifier of the latest OS security update or patch level applied to this endpoint (e.g., OS build number or last installed KB/patch ID)
source: String: Required: Name of the platform or system this endpoint data came from (e.g., EDR, MDM, CMDB, Cloud provider).
security_update_history_time: Timestamp: Optional: Timestamp of the most recent security update in ISO 8601 format
disk_encryption: Boolean: Recommended: Indicates whether full disk encryption is enabled e.g. FileVault on macOS, BitLocker on Windows. LUKS on Linux and so on.
patch_update: String: Recommended: Current OS patch compliance status for this endpoint (e.g., Up to date, Outdated, Critical missing, Unknown).
ip_address: String: Optional: Primary IP address of the endpoint.
password_policy: Boolean: Recommended: Indicates whether the endpoint complies with the organisation password policy.
status_detail: String: Optional: Additional context describing the current status or reason for non-compliance.

org.name: String: Optional: Name of the organization or tenant the endpoint belongs to.
org.uid: String: Optional: Unique identifier of the organization or tenant.

os_name: String: Optional: Operating system name (e.g., Windows, Linux, macOS).
os_version: String: Optional: Operating system version or build (e.g., 11.0.22631, 22.04).
type: String: Optional: Endpoint platform or form factor (e.g., Workstation, Laptop, Server, Mobile, VM).
type_id: Integer: Required: The device type ID. 0: Unknown, 1: Server, 2: Desktop, 3: Laptop, 4:     Tablet, 5: Mobile, 6: Virtual, 7: IOT, 8: Browser, 9: Firewall, 10: Switch, 11: Hub, 12: Router, 13: IDS, 14: IPS, 15: Load Balancer, 99: Other
user: String: Optional: Identifier or username of the primary user associated with the endpoint.
device_managed: Boolean: Optional: Indicates whether the endpoint is managed by corporate tooling (true = managed, false = unmanaged).
status: String: Optional: Current operational status of the endpoint (e.g., Online, Offline, Retired).
status_id: Integer: Optional: Normalized numeric status code for the endpoint.
created_time: Timestamp String: Optional: Time when the endpoint record was created, in ISO 8601 format.
last_seen_time: Timestamp String: Optional: Last time the endpoint checked in or reported telemetry, in ISO 8601 format.
